easy.title: Word Formation: Healthy Living
easy.instructions: Read the text below. Use the word in CAPITALS (shown next to each gap) to form a word that fits. Choose the correct answer.
easy.passage: Eating a balanced diet is _____ (ESSENCE) for good health. Many people find it _____ (DIFFICULT) to eat well when they are busy. _____ (REGULAR) exercise can improve your energy and mood. It is _____ (IMPORTANT) to drink plenty of water. _____ (SUCCESS) in staying healthy often depends on small daily choices. A _____ (COMBINE) of good food and exercise works best. _____ (FORTUNATE), bad habits can be hard to change, but it is never too late to start. With _____ (DETERMINE), you can build a healthier lifestyle.

gaps.explanation: We need an adjective: essential for = necessary for.
Find it + adjective: find it difficult (to do something).
We need an adverb to modify 'exercise': regularly.
It is + adjective: It is important to ...
Sentence adverb: Unfortunately = it is a shame that.
With + noun: with determination = with the will to succeed.

medium.title: Word Formation: The Environment
medium.instructions: Use the word in CAPITALS to form a word that fits. Write one word in each gap.
medium.passage: Environmental _____ (AWARE) has grown in recent years. _____ (POLLUTE) from industry and transport remains a major problem. Many countries are investing in _____ (RENEW) energy such as wind and solar. _____ (REDUCE) carbon emissions is essential to limit climate change. _____ (SCIENCE) agree that action is needed. _____ (GOVERN) policies can encourage greener choices. Individual _____ (RESPONSIBLE) also matters. Small changes in _____ (CONSUME) habits can make a difference.

hard.title: Word Formation: Technology and Society
hard.instructions: Use the word in CAPITALS to form a word that fits. Write one word in each gap.
hard.passage: The _____ (RAPID) of technological change has left many people feeling _____ (CERTAIN) about the future. _____ (EMPLOY) patterns have shifted as automation increases. _____ (CRITIC) of social media point to its effect on mental health. _____ (EVIDENT) suggests that screen time can affect sleep. _____ (REGULATE) of online platforms is still being debated. _____ (INNOVATE) in education may help prepare learners for new jobs. _____ (COLLABORATE) between governments and companies will be needed.

gaps.explanation: The rapidity of = the speed of.

expert.title: Word Formation: Global Challenges
expert.instructions: Use the word in CAPITALS to form a word that fits. Write one word in each gap.
expert.passage: _____ (SUSTAIN) development requires balancing economic growth with environmental _____ (PRESERVE). _____ (EQUAL) between nations remains a challenge. _____ (MIGRATE) driven by conflict or climate is increasing. _____ (TOLERATE) and _____ (INCLUDE) are essential in diverse societies. _____ (ACCOUNT) of institutions is demanded by citizens. _____ (RESOLVE) of long-standing disputes often depends on dialogue.
